title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. zahnii
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. zahnii, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium ctenodon subsp. zahnii include treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
